message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. To verify the account, confirm the full name on the borrower profile or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Karan Mehta. Now please give me the exact closure amount and the deadline, and I’ll consider it.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. Verified: Karan Mehta, phone ending 24. Account ****8824, amount due 12921. The exact closure amount is 11370.48, payable within 7 days. Confirm if you want this option reviewed.
11370.48 within 7 days is workable, but I need the exact payment deadline date and whether there’s any further reduction if I pay sooner.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. The exact reduced-closure amount is 11370.48. The payment deadline is 7 days from the offer date. No further reduction is available under policy for paying sooner.
